name_en: Upgraded B brand plaid leather wallet, includes chain-embellished leather shoulder strap. Can be used as a small bag on its own or as a wallet inside a daily tote. Counter quality, fine craftsmanship, real-life photos. Black plaid, 21cm*12cm*3cm, 8687
